{{Infobox group
| name = Navigators (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Navigators (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Navigators are a specialized [[Guild]] within the [[Elder Empire]] that possesses the unique ability to traverse the dangerous [[Aion Sea]]. Because of their mastery over these waters, they are considered the only force capable of crossing the sea at will. This monopoly on maritime travel allows members to amass significant personal wealth, and their services are highly valued; passage on a [[Navigator vessel]] is treated as a precious commodity that can be used to settle debts or secure rare goods. While some view them with suspicion, labeling them as pirates or swindlers, they are essential for any business involving the [[Aion Sea]]. [[The Guild]]'s ability to navigate safely is not due to traditional shipbuilding, but rather their use of [[Elder]] creatures. [[Navigator]] vessels are unique, awakened objects that utilize bound [[Elders]] to guide them through the sea's many terrors. By having an [[Elder]] pull or guide the ship, the crew can travel much faster and avoid being harassed by other [[Elderspawn]]. Because of this reliance on [[Elder]] biology, Navigators often require guides to assist in their voyages. While most vessels belong to the [[Guild]], there are also independent Navigators who operate outside of its direct control.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Navigators use [[Elderspawn]] guides to cross the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The three Navigators run for the shore.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Navigators are the only ones who can safely cross the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Navigators supervise the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|As members of the Imperialist alliance, the Navigators are a group that individuals may join in pursuit of adventure and excitement. Capable of following ships into the deep [[Aion]], the group was tasked with searching for a vanishing vessel. During this period, [[Calder]] was banished to the organization. While managing these duties, the Navigators also recalled to the Capital to stock up on necessary supplies.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Navigators are part of the Imperialist alliance.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Navigators is a group one can join for excitement and adventure.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Navigators are recalling to the Capital and stocking up on supplies.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Navigators are a group capable of following ships into the deep [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was banished to the Navigators.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Navigators were searching for a vanishing ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Navigators are a [[Guild]]-organized group that performs functions similar to the [[Blackwatch]] and the [[Sleepless]]. Led by [[Cheska Bennett]], members of this organization compete for the opportunity to speak on behalf of their [[Guild]]. The [[Regent]] once employed them to facilitate the transportation of the crown. Capable of catching individuals upon the [[Aion Sea]], their vessels are distinct enough to be identified even among ordinary ships in visions.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Navigators are a group that does exactly what the [[Sleepless]] and [[Blackwatch]] do.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Navigators are a group that will compete to speak for their [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Regent]] hired the Navigators to transport the crown.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Navigators are led by [[Cheska Bennett]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ordinary ships in the vision began to look like those of the Navigators.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Navigators can catch people on the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Navigators are organized into a [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
